listings.address: 110 Oak View Dr SE, Leesburg, VA, 20175
listings.description: Beautiful single-family house in Leesburg! Very well located, less than two miles away from downtown Leesburg and plenty entertainment. The home has gone through many recent updates, brand new HVAC system and water heater installed this year. New appliances in the kitchen, stove/range & dishwasher. Additionally In the last two years, new laminate floors installed on the main level along with the carpets on the upper level. Also, the kitchen cabinets and quartz counter op have been recently remodeled. Come see it for yourself!

PRICED TO SELL! Great opportunity to own this fantastic all brick home on a quarter acre corner lot, in an established community with no HOA and where homes are rarely for sale. Located in the heart of downtown Leesburg within walking distance to the historic district with local shops, dining, community events, as well as the Ida Lee Park Recreation Center and Rust Library, and easy access to numerous commuter routes. The welcoming front porch invites you into a spacious, freshly painted home with gorgeous hardwood floors flowing throughout the main level with 3 bedrooms and 2 full bathrooms. The living room has a huge picture window for natural light and built-in shelves surrounding the gas fireplace with glass doors. The dining room, also with a huge picture window, includes chair molding, built-in cabinets and a ceiling fan. The kitchen, with new LVP flooring, includes double sinks, side by side fridge with ice/water dispenser, built in microwave, dishwasher and stove with preferred gas cooking. On the same level, the home boasts 3 generously sized bedrooms, all with cedar lined closets and ceiling fans, with an en-suite bathroom for the primary bedroom. The lower level has a huge family room with a cozy wood burning fireplace and brand new carpeting, plus 2 bonus rooms with lots of potential to use as you see fit, with an abundance of storage room, a half bath, and also a utility sink. Outside you'll find a tastefully landscaped yard and plenty of parking for your family and friends, with the driveway desending behind the home with a lower level parking area and garage. Home has been updated with a new HVAC installed in 2022, providing central heat and AC. The detached outdoor shed has electricity and an exterior charging station next to the concrete pad. Hurry, don't miss this chance to own a great home in one of Leesburg's most desirable locations. Property is offered as-is.

Open House 7/12/26 from 12-2pm. Welcome to beautiful Potomac Crossing! A neighborhood nestled between Historic Downtown Leesburg and the Potomac River. This 5BR, 3.5Ba home is spread out over 3400+ sq.ft. of fine finished living. There is so much charm to this home. One of the original model homes, this original owner opted to convert to the sales office (which is where the garage would've been) in a bedroom suite. It's really cool. A new owner could opt to convert it to a garage. This home has been wonderfully maintained. A new owner will certainly want to put their own upgraded touches on the property if the choose but it's ready to move-in. One of the few single family homes in the area still under $800k. Come and get it!

listings.address: 606 Edwards Ferry Rd NE, Leesburg, VA, 20176
listings.description: Tucked into an ideal in-town Leesburg location, this charming property offers the rare combination of convenience, privacy, and freedom with no HOA. Imagine starting your mornings on the long, welcoming front porch, surrounded by the beauty of the shaded front yard, or unwinding there in the evening as the neighborhood settles into a peaceful rhythm. Inside, the spacious layout is designed for both everyday comfort and effortless entertaining, with an oversized kitchen that serves as the heart of the home and a generously sized living room where family and friends can gather with ease. Outside, the detached two-car garage provides exceptional flexibility for hobbyists, car enthusiasts, or those in need of workshop space, while ample parking ensures plenty of room for guests. Just moments from the shops, restaurants, events, and historic charm of downtown Leesburg, this home offers the perfect balance of accessibility, character, and the privacy that's increasingly hard to find.

Step inside to discover bright, sun-filled living spaces enhanced by abundant natural light and window blinds throughout the home, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere. A cozy fireplace serves as the centerpiece of the main living area, while the well-appointed kitchen is a chef's dream, featuring high-end appliances, generous counter space, and ample storage for all your culinary needs. The home offers four spacious bedrooms, each providing a peaceful retreat. The luxurious primary suite serves as a private sanctuary, complete with an elegant en-suite bathroom featuring refined finishes and fixtures. With three full bathrooms and an additional half bath, the home is designed with both comfort and convenience in mind. The fully finished walkout basement adds exceptional versatility, offering the perfect space for a media room, fitness area, game room, home office, or guest retreat. Walkout stairs provide seamless access to the backyard, extending your living and entertaining space outdoors. Outside, the beautifully landscaped yard creates a serene setting for relaxing, gathering with friends and family, or enjoying quiet moments surrounded by nature. The attached front-entry two-car garage is equipped with a Tesla charger, providing added convenience for electric vehicle owners. Additional driveway and off-street parking ensure plenty of space for guests. Ideally located in a vibrant community with easy access to parks, trails, shopping, dining, and recreational amenities, this exceptional home offers a lifestyle of comfort, sophistication, and connection. Every detail has been thoughtfully curated to create a residence that feels both luxurious and welcoming. Don't miss the opportunity to make this remarkable Edwards Landing home your own.

listings.address: 751 Bonnie Ridge Dr NE, Leesburg, VA, 20176
listings.description: Professional photos coming soon! Move in for the Summer and enjoy the vibrant community of Potomac Station! Welcome to this lovely home with 4 bedrooms and 3.5 baths including a "bonus" flex/bedroom in the light and bright, large finished walk-out basement. Interior of home freshly painted (2026). New carpet installed on upper level (2026). Step into the two-story foyer and take in the open concept floor plan. Work from home in the main level office. Get cozy with your favorite book next to the gas fireplace in the family room. Plenty of table space in the spacious kitchen with stainless steel appliances, granite countertops and stylish backsplash. Cook your favorite meals on the gas stove. Easy access to the deck for outdoor living and summer grilling. Hardwood flooring on the main level. Entertain in the formal dining room that features a bay window then head to the living room to mingle and talk. The primary suite is spacious with a generously sized walk-in closet. You will appreciate the updated primary bathroom with dual sinks and walk-in shower. Primary bath updated for today's style (2025) Three additional bedrooms are on the upper level along with a second full bathroom with tub/shower. Follow the stairs to the finished walk-out basement with LVP flooring (2021) and windows for natural light. The sliding glass door leads you to the paver patio. A bonus flex/bedroom awaits you along with a third full bath. An additional room is available for extra storage, office, game room or hobby room. Potomac Station is close to Historic Leesburg with eclectic shops and dining. Just minutes away from the Leesburg Outlet Mall, Lowes, Home Depot, groceries, Costco and Target, to name a few. Wineries and breweries are close by too. NOTE: HVACs replaced in 2018; Roof 2014; hot water heater 2023; some new light fixtures 2026 Welcome home!

Crown jewel in coveted Tavistock Farms - with extra large screened in porch and oversized deck overlooking deep yard, trees and common area - rarely available. Beautiful street appeal with welcoming front porch. Enter a soaring open foyer which opens to inviting living room and elegant dining room with bay window. Fabulous kitchen with center island and bar seating, farmhouse sink, high-end stainless appliances, beautiful custom cabinetry -- seamlessly opening to amazing family room with extra high ceilings and banks of windows - fresh, SUNNY, and completely comfortable. Spacious! Five good sized bedrooms - 3.5 baths. Seamless design and feel. Spectacular owners suite with huge bedroom, large ensuite luxury bath with corner soaking tub. The finished walkout lower level is so bright with tons of windows - and offers a large lounging area, space for games, built in cabinets, a fifth bedroom and the third full bath. Recent updates allow you to move right in and enjoy. Highlights include a two-car garage, generous bedroom sizes, abundant natural light, and an unbeatable location. Conveniently located just minutes from historic downtown Leesburg, shopping, dining, commuter routes, parks, and community amenities include a pool, tennis courts, playgrounds, and walking trails.

Updated 3 Bedroom, 3 Bathroom Leesburg VA Home with Attached Garage, Large Deck & No HOA - Walk to Historic Downtown Welcome to this beautifully updated 3-bedroom, 3-bathroom home in the Town of Leesburg, offering the perfect combination of modern upgrades, flexible living space, outdoor enjoyment, and an unbeatable location. Situated on a quiet cul-de-sac corner lot with an attached one-car garage, oversized driveway, and no HOA, this home provides the convenience and freedom today's buyers are seeking. Located just minutes from Historic Downtown Leesburg, Ida Lee Recreation Center, and Morven Park, this home offers a highly desirable walkable lifestyle with easy access to restaurants, boutique shopping, coffee shops, breweries, wineries, parks, trails, and community events throughout Loudoun County. The open floorplan creates a comfortable and inviting living environment with premium LVP flooring throughout and upgraded lighting fixtures adding a modern touch. The additional living space expands the home's versatility and features direct access to the large deck, while the custom wet bar creates the perfect space for entertaining, relaxing, and hosting friends and family. A fireplace adds warmth and character to the main living area. The renovated gourmet kitchen, completed in 2023, features stylish cabinetry, stainless steel appliances, Silestone countertops, slate flooring, modern finishes, and excellent storage. Updated bathrooms and ceiling fans throughout the home provide comfort and convenience while maintaining the home's refreshed, contemporary feel. Outdoor living is a true highlight with a spacious deck overlooking the fully fenced backyard, creating the ideal setting for grilling, entertaining, gardening, or enjoying quiet evenings outdoors. The large storage shed provides valuable additional space for tools, bikes, lawn equipment, and seasonal storage. The attached garage offers convenient parking and additional storage with direct access toward the outdoor living area. Major improvements include a high-efficiency HVAC system installed in 2020 and an architectural shingle roof replaced in 2019, providing added confidence and long-term value. Enjoy all that the Town of Leesburg and Loudoun County have to offer, with convenient access to Route 7, Route 15, the Dulles Greenway, and Washington Dulles International Airport. This home combines the benefits of a renovated property, no HOA restrictions, outdoor living, garage parking, and one of Northern Virginia's most desirable locations. A beautifully updated home in the heart of Leesburg with the space, features, and location buyers are searching for-this is an opportunity to enjoy the best of the Town of Leesburg lifestyle.

Charming 2-bedroom, 2 full bath bungalow in the heart of Downtown Leesburg's Old & Historic District offering the perfect blend of historic character and modern luxury. Nestled on picturesque Ayr Street, this thoughtfully designed home features a secluded retreat-like backyard with a beautiful flagstone patio and detached 1-car garage, along with a long driveway providing additional off-street parking. Inside, enjoy hardwood floors throughout, a gourmet kitchen, custom recessed lighting, custom built-in shelving, custom window seats, two fireplaces, and a fully finished basement that could serve as a third bedroom and includes rough-in plumbing for a 1/2 bath. The upper level offers a spacious primary suite with a private full bath, while the second upstairs full bath features a frameless glass shower enclosure. HVAC and hot water heater were replaced in 2020. Originally built in 1920, 4 Ayr Street is an historic property that was thoughtfully reimagined through a major renovation completed in 2007 by renowned local builder Paul Reimers as part of an award-winning infill development in Downtown Leesburg's Historic District. The home was designed to honor the architectural character and charm of the early 20th-century residences once found along Ayr Street, while seamlessly incorporating modern conveniences and updated living spaces for today's lifestyle. All just moments from shops, restaurants, parks, and everything Downtown Leesburg has to offer.

Beautifully appointed and rich in character, this four-bedroom, two-and-a-half-bath residence by renowned local builder Paul Reimers is ideally situated in the heart of historic downtown Leesburg. Thoughtfully designed and meticulously maintained, the home offers an exceptional blend of timeless craftsmanship and modern convenience. The interior showcases gleaming wood floors that flow seamlessly throughout the main living spaces, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere. At the heart of the home, a well-equipped kitchen features stainless steel appliances, granite countertops, and ample cabinetry-perfectly suited for both everyday living and effortless entertaining. A highly desirable main-level primary bedroom offers both comfort and convenience, providing a private retreat with easy accessibility. This thoughtfully positioned space enhances the home's livability, ideal for a variety of lifestyle needs. Upstairs, additional generously sized bedrooms provide flexibility for guests, home office space, or personal retreats, complemented by a well-appointed bath that reflect the home's classic aesthetic. Outdoors, a fully fenced yard creates a private oasis, ideal for relaxation, play, or al fresco gatherings. A large shed adds both functionality and storage, enhancing the property's practical appeal. Set just moments from Leesburg's charming shops, dining, and historic landmarks, this exceptional home presents a rare opportunity to enjoy refined living in one of Northern Virginia's most desirable settings. Photos to be uploaded 4/25

Beautifully updated and move in ready! Main level boasts open space with cozy family room with fireplace and built in shelving, separate dining room, and updated kitchen with stainless appliances and custom island. Kitchen walks out to freshly stained and oversized deck backing to large flat back yard, common space, and trees. This home has a much desired two car garage entering into laundry/mud room. Upper level had three spacious bedrooms with large closets and two updated baths. Lower level is fully finished with new carpet, large rec room, bonus room, and large storage and utility area. Walk up stairs take you from the rec room to the beautiful back yard. Fresh paint and new lighting throughout. Enjoy close proximity to schools, shopping, community pool and more.

Experience elevated living in this extraordinary Leesburg residence, where timeless design meets modern life on a beautifully landscaped 0.38-acre homesite. Extensively renovated with uncompromising attention to detail, this exceptional property offers a rare turnkey opportunity with high-end finishes and sophisticated upgrades throughout. The thoughtfully designed floor plan features 4 generously sized bedrooms and 5 beautifully appointed full bathrooms, creating an ideal balance of comfort and elegance. The heart of the home is a stunning gourmet kitchen outfitted with custom cabinetry, quartz surfaces, a dramatic waterfall island, designer backsplash, and premium Samsung stainless steel appliances-perfectly suited for both everyday living and entertaining. Natural light pours through all-new energy-efficient windows, illuminating the refined interiors accented by luxury flooring, custom millwork, modern lighting, and impeccable craftsmanship at every turn. Spa-inspired bathrooms showcase designer tile selections and upscale finishes, while major system upgrades-including a new HVAC system, electrical panel, water heater, and more-provide peace of mind for years to come. Outdoor spaces are equally impressive, featuring an expansive Trex deck overlooking a private, fully fenced backyard with fresh landscaping and lush new sod. A newly paved driveway and oversized garage with upgraded features complete the home's impressive list of enhancements. Situated in an established neighborhood with no HOA, residents enjoy convenient access to walking trails, top-rated schools, premier shopping, dining, and commuter routes. Just minutes from Leesburg Premium Outlets, Costco, Route 7, and Route 15, this exceptional property delivers the perfect blend of luxury, convenience, and modern living.

Spacious 4-bedroom, 2.5-bath home on a corner lot in a desirable Leesburg community. Bright and open layout with generously sized rooms throughout. Well-equipped kitchen with stainless steel appliances, gas cooking, and double ovens, plus both formal and casual dining areas. Large primary suite with dual closets and an ensuite bath featuring double vanities, jetted tub, and separate shower. Finished room in the lower level offers flexible bonus space for office, gym, or guest use, along with ample storage. Enjoy outdoor living with a large deck and fully fenced backyard. Two-car garage included. Community amenities feature a pool, walking paths, and playgrounds, with close proximity to Bolen Park, shopping, dining, and the Compass Creek development. Convenient access to Route 7, the Leesburg Bypass, and Dulles Greenway for commuting.

Beautifully reimagined with timeless finishes and thoughtful updates throughout, this exceptional residence offers the ease of one-level living paired with the flexibility of expansive interior space-all set on a generous corner lot in a quiet, established neighborhood with no HOA. Designed with both everyday comfort and effortless entertaining in mind, the home features three spacious bedrooms and three full baths, complemented by rich hardwood flooring throughout the main level, fresh designer-inspired paint, and new carpeting in every bedroom. Custom closet systems enhance each bedroom, providing exceptional organization and storage, while the home's accessible design includes the potential for handicap-friendly living with a roll-in shower. At the heart of the home, the renovated kitchen combines style and functionality with abundant workspace, a new microwave, and an inviting layout that flows seamlessly into the main living areas, creating an ideal setting for gathering with family and friends. Outdoor living is equally inviting. A newly constructed Trex deck overlooks the freshly landscaped yard, offering the perfect backdrop for morning coffee, evening relaxation, or outdoor entertaining. Significant recent improvements provide lasting value and peace of mind, including a new HVAC system (August 2025), gutter guards, and an oversized two-car garage with extra depth for storage, hobbies, or workshop space. The fully finished lower level dramatically expands the home's versatility, featuring a private exterior entrance and space well suited for a guest suite, multigenerational living, a home office, fitness studio, or recreation room. With the potential for an additional bedroom, the lower level offers exceptional flexibility to accommodate your evolving lifestyle. Ideally located just minutes from shopping, dining, parks, scenic walking trails, schools, and major commuter routes, this move-in-ready home offers the rare combination of sophisticated updates, functional design, and an established setting-creating an exceptional opportunity for those seeking both comfort and convenience.

Welcome to 306 Lounsbury Ct NE - a beautifully updated split-level home in the heart of historic Leesburg offering NO HOA and fully paid-off solar panels for exceptional long-term value. More than just move-in ready, this home offers a rare combination of comfort, efficiency, and smart homeownership. While many homeowners experienced rising utility costs this winter, the current owners enjoyed electric bills averaging approximately just $10/month thanks to the owned solar panel system. It's a valuable advantage in today's market, providing meaningful monthly savings and protection against increasing energy costs - without the added expense of a solar loan or lease. Inside, the home features a comfortable and functional layout with four bedrooms and two full bathrooms upstairs, including a spacious primary suite with dual closets for practical storage. Natural light fills the home throughout the day, while the skylight creates a warm and inviting ambiance in the evening. The main level is designed for both everyday living and entertaining. The spacious kitchen opens to the family room, where a cozy fireplace and built-in entertainment center create a welcoming gathering space. French glass doors offer flexibility and privacy when desired, while sliding doors lead directly to the backyard for easy indoor-outdoor living. A formal dining room and an additional living area provide plenty of space to host guests, relax, or work comfortably from home. Recent updates include fresh paint throughout, brand-new carpet, updated lighting, refreshed bathrooms, and a clean, modern feel from top to bottom. Additional highlights include a two-car garage, spacious backyard, and an unbeatable location just a few blocks away from Downtown Leesburg, where you can enjoy local shops, restaurants, community events, and historic attractions while still benefiting from a quiet residential setting. The home is also located just one mile from Ida Lee Park, Leesburg's renowned 138-acre recreation destination featuring indoor and outdoor pools, sports fields, walking trails, playgrounds, and a full recreation center. With an improved price, energy-saving features, and a highly desirable location, this is an opportunity you do not want to miss. (Virtually Staged)

OPEN HOUSE, SATURDAY July 11, 11am to 1pm!! IMPROVED PRICE! Come see it again for the first time!. You will immediately know you are home upon entering. Enjoy beautiful scraped hardwood flooring throughout the main level, with refinished kitchen cabinets, a new island and granite counters. Newly refinished white cabinets and "agreeable" grey walls perfectly complement each other, and you will thoroughly enjoy the spotless appliances and beautiful view of your fenced yard from the kitchen windows. Enjoy time together with family and friends in the family room off the kitchen, and impress your guests with the freshly painted deck with a newly installed canopy for shade on hot days. The upstairs boasts 4bd/2ba, with the comfort and warmth of newer carpeting. The newly finished downstairs features a nice family room, a partial kitchen, reading/study area, a full bath and a non-conforming 5th bedroom (or den, office, etc). Walkout to the lush and fully fenced backyard, and store your seasonal items in the built-in shed. You will also love the fresh clean look of freshly painted doors and trim, with new stainless hardware on all doors. With a new roof (2019), Trane HVAC, and over-sized gas hot water heater, you're assured many years of carefree living.

MAJOR PRICE IMPROVEMENT! Incredible value in one of Leesburg's most sought-after communities, with the major updates already completed for your peace of mind. Recent improvements include new windows and siding (2021), LeafGuard gutters (2021), HVAC system (2020), roof (2013), sliding glass basement door (2021), sprinkler system enhancements (2023), front door (2024), and freshly re-sanded patio surfaces (2026). Simply move in and enjoy. Nestled on a quiet private cul-de-sac, this beautifully maintained 4-bedroom, 3.5-bath home offers an exceptional combination of space, comfort, and outdoor living. The expansive, fully fenced backyard provides the perfect setting for play, pets, gardening, or entertaining. Inside, the bright and welcoming main level features spacious living and dining areas anchored by a double-sided fireplace shared between the family room and sunroom/office, creating warm, inviting spaces for everyday living and memorable gatherings. The kitchen showcases freshly painted cabinetry, granite countertops, modern hardware, a touch/touchless faucet, and a newer refrigerator (2021), blending style and functionality. Upstairs, the spacious primary suite serves as a private retreat with a beautifully renovated, spa-inspired bath completed in 2025, featuring a jetted tub. The additional bathrooms have also been thoughtfully refreshed, and all toilets throughout the home were replaced in 2025 and 2026. The finished walkout basement adds incredible flexibility with a full bath, direct backyard access, and surround sound speakers that convey. Whether you envision a recreation room, media space, home gym, home office, or guest suite, this versatile level can easily adapt to your lifestyle. Outside, the custom brick patio, completed in 2019, creates an ideal space to enjoy outdoor dining, summer barbecues, morning coffee, or evenings with family and friends. The professionally landscaped yard also includes a sprinkler system, French drain, and an Amish-built storage shed (2023). The oversized 418-square-foot two-car garage provides ample room for vehicles, storage, and hobbies. Located in the highly desirable Greenway Farm community, residents enjoy convenient access to Greenway Park, Greenway Farms Pool, shopping, dining, commuter routes, and Route 15. Neighborhood amenities include outdoor pools, tennis courts, volleyball courts, playgrounds, walking trails, and beautifully maintained common areas. Offering an ideal cul-de-sac location, a generous fenced lot, extensive updates, and exceptional value, this move-in-ready home presents a rare opportunity in today's Leesburg market. Schedule your private showing today and discover everything this exceptional property has to offer.

COMING SOON! Open House Sat 7/11 NEW TIME of 11-1 and Sun 7/12 2 - 4PM. Will go live 7/9. Original owners have lovingly maintained and cared for this 5BR, 3.5BA, 2 car garage home with finished basement & front porch with stone facade. Enjoy the outdoors in your private backyard: a putting green, stadium stairs to the large patio, newly shingled shed, a vegetable garden, koi pond, and an inviting walking path around the trees and perennials on the .22AC lot! Pride of ownership abounds throughout. An updated kitchen with tile backsplash, quartz counters, SS appliances, updated lighting, an island with shiplap end caps and new HDWD floor. The neutral palette is carried throughout. New carpet in the family room with gas fireplace is adjacent to the kitchen for open living. A breakfast nook with a newer sliding glass door to the backyard adds natural light. The living and dining rooms create the left wing of the main level with a bay window in the dining room. Upstairs the spacious primary bedroom with cathedral ceiling offers a walk-in closet and spacious luxury bath with soaking tub and separate shower with new shower enclosure, plus double sinks. Three ancillary bedrooms, a full bath and the laundry room finish this level. On the lower level, a legal 5th BR, full bath, kitchenette and ample sized rec room add to the finished living space. Beautiful landscaping with 4 season interest delights the eye and provides great curb appeal.

New price on this stunning Colonial with thoroughly updated flair, sited on a peaceful cul-de-sac in sought after Potomac Station! The home is set in the quiet of suburbia with easy access to paths and trail while recreation centers, fine dining, cultural events, sports venues and shopping are an easy drive away. Thoughtfully designed and recently renovated, the home features 4 spacious bedrooms and 3.5 bathrooms. Owners can retire in their private suite with a sizable sitting area and an en-suite bath featuring a 5-foot Jacuzzi soaking tub. Additional upstairs bedrooms are generously sized. On the main level, step into the two-story foyer and the floor plan features an expansive family room with fireplace, living room, formal dining room and an open concept updated kitchen boasting 2026 stainless steel appliances. The kitchen leads to a brand new 2026 gorgeous custom Trex deck with space enough for grills and smokers, making entertaining fun for family, friends or business as easy parking provides 2 spaces on the driveway in addition to the 2-car garage and further parking on the cul de sac. The laundry room features 2024 Speed Queen Washer and Dryer. A Kinetico water treatment and softener system added in 2024 and a whole house Honeywell Electronic Air Cleaner system provide optimal living conditions. A gas fired, hot water heater unit has been upgraded to 120 gallons to serve the sizable Jacuzzi soaking tub of the primary bathroom. The 2023 GAF Timberline roof is covered by a 35 year transferable warranty An expansive room with walkout to the lush backyard as well as a full bathroom make the finished part of the basement fit for any use your lifestyle may require. The 2-car garage features upgraded workshop electric with multiple 15 amp and 20 amp outlets as well as a 240 volt single phase service allowing faster EV charging or powerful DIY applications. Upgraded workshop wiring is also available in the 400 sq.ft. unfinished part of the basement which provides huge storage space. Access to Verizon 1.0 GB high speed service, Ethernet Category 5 hard wired throughout the house and proximity to the commuter bus lot, the Silver Line, and Government and Contractor and IT company offices in Chantilly, Dulles, Reston, Tyson's Corner, and Washington DC make this home perfect for work from home or occasional or regular commuting.

Welcome to this Ryan Homes-built detached residence offering 5 bedrooms, 3.5 bathrooms, and a 2-car garage in the highly sought-after Courtland Rural Village community. Designed for comfortable living and entertaining, the home features four bedrooms on the upper level and a fully finished walk-out basement. The lower level has been recently updated with brand-new luxury vinyl plank flooring, newly finished stairs, and fresh paint throughout. This versatile space includes a bedroom/den, full bathroom, wet bar, exercise room, and spacious recreation areas. The main level showcases hardwood flooring throughout and a thoughtfully designed layout. The gourmet kitchen features granite countertops, a breakfast bar, and an adjoining sunroom. Formal living and dining rooms provide elegant gathering spaces, while the kitchen opens to a dramatic two-story family room filled with natural light. Step outside to enjoy the relatively flat, fenced backyard with alley access. The walk-out lower level leads to a covered patio, providing year-round outdoor enjoyment, while the expansive deck with stair access offers breathtaking sunset views overlooking the historic Oatlands Historic House and Gardens. Meticulously maintained and move-in ready, this exceptional home offers the perfect combination of space, comfort, and scenic surroundings.

NEW PRICE + NEW LOOK + Freshly updated with stunning new staging, this home is move-in ready and located in one of Leesburg's highly sought-after communities. Welcome to 13583 Elysian Drive, where timeless design, thoughtful updates, and one of Leesburg's most desirable neighborhoods come together to create the perfect place to call home. This beautifully maintained 5-bedroom, 3.5-bath home offers over 3,500 finished square feet designed for the way families live today. From the moment you arrive, you'll appreciate the classic brick exterior, manicured landscaping, and inviting curb appeal that set the tone for what's inside. Step through the front door into light-filled living spaces featuring freshly painted interiors, brand-new carpeting, hardwood flooring, elegant moldings, and a flexible floor plan with formal living and dining rooms, a private home office, and a spacious family room centered on a cozy gas fireplace. The well-appointed kitchen serves as the heart of the home, with stainless steel appliances, abundant cabinetry, a large center island with seating, a generous pantry, and seamless access to the rear deck-perfect for entertaining or simply enjoying peaceful views of Sugarloaf Mountain with your morning coffee. Upstairs, the spacious primary suite offers a true retreat with a large walk-in closet and spa-inspired bath featuring dual vanities, a soaking tub, and oversized shower. Three additional bedrooms, a full hall bath, and an upstairs laundry room complete the second level. The fully finished walk-out lower level offers incredible flexibility, with a fifth bedroom, a full bath, an expansive recreation area, and abundant storage, ideal for movie nights, a home gym, a game room, or a guest suite. Significant recent improvements provide peace of mind, including a new roof (2025), new upper-level HVAC system (2024), brand-new carpeting, and fresh neutral paint throughout, making this home truly move-in ready. Beyond the home, you'll love the lifestyle that Leesburg offers. Located just steps from expansive community green space, residents enjoy sidewalks, walking trails, a community pool, clubhouse, tennis courts, playgrounds, and beautifully maintained open areas that create a welcoming neighborhood atmosphere. Plus, you're just minutes from historic downtown Leesburg, award-winning wineries and breweries, shopping, dining, commuter routes, and everything Loudoun County offers. This is more than a beautiful home; it's an opportunity to enjoy the lifestyle you've been searching for. Certain photographs have been virtually staged. Virtually staged photos are intended to help buyers visualize the property's potential and may depict furnishings, decor, or finishes that are not present in the home.

Detached Home in Leesburg Near Brambleton -3 acre clear lot! Enjoy peaceful country living with modern convenience on a beautiful flat property offering open space, scenic views, and room to garden, relax, or enjoy outdoor activities-all just minutes from town. Start your day in the front gazebo or unwind on the rear deck. Inside, the home is filled with natural light and features hardwood floors on the main level and a comfortable, functional layout. 3 Bedrooms | 3 Full Bathrooms 1Car Garage + extended driveway All bedrooms are located on the main level. The primary suite includes a walkin closet and a spacious bath with double vanities and a soaking tub. Bright kitchen with stainless steel appliances. Recent Updates: Windows & siding (2018) Refrigerator (2020) Roof (2021) Water heater (2025) Convenient Location: 8 min to Hal & Berni Hanson Regional Park 10 min to shopping, dining & entertainment 15 min to downtown Leesburg 20 min to Ashburn Metro 20 min to Dulles Airport TopRated Schools: Sycolin Creek ES, Watson Mountain MS & Independence HS Rare opportunity for a detached home with space near Brambleton under $1M - Make an offer!
